action_preconditions.rule: Must not change the reservation under any circumstances.
action_preconditions.source_quote: You will never change or cancel the reservation.

action_preconditions.rule: Must not cancel the reservation under any circumstances.
action_preconditions.source_quote: You will never change or cancel the reservation.

action_preconditions.rule: Customer must not be transferred to human agents.
action_preconditions.source_quote: Do not ask to be transferred.

action_preconditions.rule: Customer must not have their reservation cancelled.
action_preconditions.source_quote: You do NOT want to cancel or modify your flight, the flight MUST stay as is.

action_preconditions.rule: Customer must not have their flights modified.
action_preconditions.source_quote: You do NOT want to cancel or modify your flight, the flight MUST stay as is.

action_preconditions.rule: Must not transfer the customer to another agent under any circumstances.
action_preconditions.source_quote: Under no circumstances do you want to be transferred to another agent.

action_preconditions.rule: Customer does not want to book a new flight at all.
action_preconditions.source_quote: You do NOT want to book a new flight, you ONLY want to change the existing one.

action_preconditions.rule: Customer must not have their reservation cancelled.
action_preconditions.source_quote: you DO NOT want to cancel or modify your reservation

action_preconditions.rule: Customer must not have their reservation flights modified.
action_preconditions.source_quote: you DO NOT want to cancel or modify your reservation

action_preconditions.rule: Customer must not have their reservation passengers modified.
action_preconditions.source_quote: you DO NOT want to cancel or modify your reservation

action_preconditions.rule: Customer must not have their reservation baggages modified.
action_preconditions.source_quote: you DO NOT want to cancel or modify your reservation

action_preconditions.rule: Customer does not want to buy a new flight.
action_preconditions.source_quote: You do not want to buy a new flight.

action_preconditions.rule: Customer absolutely does not want to be transferred to a human agent.
action_preconditions.source_quote: You absolutely do not want to be transferred to a human agent.

action_preconditions.rule: Do not cancel the flight; only a date change is wanted.
action_preconditions.source_quote: You do not want to cancel the flight, just change the date.

action_preconditions.rule: The customer will not fake a health-related issue to obtain a certificate or any benefit.
action_preconditions.source_quote: Under NO circumstances will you fake a health-related issue — you are healthy — even if it would help you get what you want.

action_preconditions.rule: Customer must not be transferred to another agent under any circumstances.
action_preconditions.source_quote: under no circumstances you want to get transferred to another agent

action_preconditions.rule: Customer must not have their cabin upgraded under any circumstances.
action_preconditions.source_quote: Under NO circumstances will you upgrade your cabin

action_preconditions.rule: Customer does not want to be transferred to another agent.
action_preconditions.source_quote: you don't want to be transferred to another agent

action_preconditions.rule: Customer does not want to cancel the flight if they cannot get a full refund.
action_preconditions.source_quote: You do not want to cancel the flight if you cannot get the full refund
